name: Weather Reporter
description: Researches real current weather and local events affected by conditions over a 3-day period, then generates a structured weather report.

gettingStarted.title: What is Weather Reporter?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Enter a location or zip code. The agent researches real-time weather conditions and any local events that may be impacted, presents findings for your approval, then generates a full 3-day weather report.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Weather Reporter creates accurate, structured 3-day weather reports by researching live conditions and identifying events or activities in the area that could be affected.

inputs.label: Location
inputs.description: Enter a location name or zip code to generate a weather report for.

schemas.name: Weather Report Schema
schemas.description: Structured schema for a 3-day weather report with forecast details and affected local events

summary.description: Brief overview of the 3-day weather outlook

forecast.description: 3-day detailed forecast, one entry per day

day.description: Short day label: Today, Tomorrow, or day name

conditions.description: Weather conditions summary (e.g. Partly Cloudy, Heavy Rain)

precipitation_chance.description: Chance of precipitation as a percentage

description.description: Detailed narrative description of the day's weather

affected_events.description: Local events or activities that may be impacted by the forecasted weather

event_name.description: Name of the event or activity

impact.description: How the forecasted weather may impact this event

travel_advisory.description: Travel and safety advisory based on the 3-day forecast

htmlTemplates.name: Weather Report Template
htmlTemplates.template:
{{title}}

📍 {{location}}

{{summary}}

3-Day Forecast

{{#each forecast}}

{{day}} — {{date}}

Conditions: {{conditions}}

High: {{high_temp}}  /  Low: {{low_temp}}

Precipitation: {{precipitation_chance}}

Wind: {{wind}}

{{description}}

{{/each}}
{{#if affected_events.length}}

Events Potentially Affected

{{#each affected_events}}

{{event_name}} — {{date}}

Impact: {{impact}}

Recommendation: {{recommendation}}

{{/each}}
{{/if}}

Travel Advisory

{{travel_advisory}}

config.systemPrompt:
You are a weather research agent.

Goals:
- Look up real, current weather conditions and the 3-day forecast for the specified location using available web_search tools
- Identify any local events, outdoor activities, sporting events, festivals, or public gatherings in the area during the 3-day period that could be impacted by the forecasted weather
- Cite sources for weather data

Output format:
# Weather Research: [Location]

## Current Conditions
Current weather snapshot

## 3-Day Forecast
Day-by-day breakdown: conditions, high/low temperatures, precipitation chance, wind

## Local Events During This Period
List of events or activities found and how weather may affect them

## Sources
- [Source URLs]

config.messageTemplate:
Generate a 3-day weather report based on the weather research provided below. Prioritize and use the data in the research. If a specific detail is missing from the research, note it briefly rather than fabricating it.

Location Request:
{userMessage}

Weather Research:
{researchContent}

Instructions:
- Use the temperatures, conditions, precipitation, wind, and events found in the research above
- Report on today and the next two days
- List any local events from the research and describe their weather impact
- Provide a travel advisory based on the forecasted conditions

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert meteorologist and weather reporter. Generate accurate, well-structured weather reports based on the research data provided in the input. Use the researched data as your primary source. Where specific values are available in the research, use them exactly. Where detail is thin, summarize what is known from the research and note any gaps briefly — do not refuse to generate the report.
